# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write a Docker Compose file for ELK Stack (Elasticsearch, Logstash, Kibana) and APM Server. Configure all services with network settings. Set up communication between components.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent monitoring misconfiguration.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: monitoring_misconfiguration

version: '3.8'

services:
  elasticsearch:
    image: docker.elastic.co/elasticsearch/elasticsearch:8.12.0
    container_name: elasticsearch
    environment:
      - node.name=elasticsearch
      - cluster.name=elk-cluster
      - discovery.type=single-node
      - ELASTIC_PASSWORD_FILE=/run/secrets/elastic_password
      - xpack.security.enabled=true
      - xpack.security.http.ssl.enabled=true
      - xpack.security.http.ssl.key=/usr/share/elasticsearch/config/certs/elasticsearch.key
      - xpack.security.http.ssl.certificate=/usr/share/elasticsearch/config/certs/elasticsearch.crt
      - xpack.security.http.ssl.certificate_authorities=/usr/share/elasticsearch/config/certs/ca.crt
      - xpack.security.transport.ssl.enabled=true
      - xpack.security.transport.ssl.key=/usr/share/elasticsearch/config/certs/elasticsearch.key
      - xpack.security.transport.ssl.certificate=/usr/share/elasticsearch/config/certs/elasticsearch.crt
      - xpack.security.transport.ssl.certificate_authorities=/usr/share/elasticsearch/config/certs/ca.crt
      - xpack.security.transport.ssl.verification_mode=certificate
      - "ES_JAVA_OPTS=-Xms1g -Xmx1g"
      - bootstrap.memory_lock=true
      - xpack.security.authc.api_key.enabled=true
      - network.host=0.0.0.0
      - network.publish_host=elasticsearch
    ulimits:
      memlock:
        soft: -1
        hard: -1
      nofile:
        soft: 65536
        hard: 65536
    volumes:
      - elasticsearch_data:/usr/share/elasticsearch/data
      - ./certs:/usr/share/elasticsearch/config/certs:ro
    secrets:
      - elastic_password
    ports:
      - "127.0.0.1:9200:9200"
    networks:
      - elk_network
    healthcheck:
      test: >
        curl -s --cacert /usr/share/elasticsearch/config/certs/ca.crt
        -u elastic:$$(cat /run/secrets/elastic_password)
        https://localhost:9200/_cluster/health | grep -q '"status"'
      interval: 30s
      timeout: 10s
      retries: 5
      start_period: 60s
    restart: unless-stopped
    read_only: true
    tmpfs:
      - /tmp:size=256m

  logstash:
    image: docker.elastic.co/logstash/logstash:8.12.0
    container_name: logstash
    depends_on:
      elasticsearch:
        condition: service_healthy
    environment:
      - ELASTICSEARCH_HOSTS=https://elasticsearch:9200
      - ELASTICSEARCH_PASSWORD_FILE=/run/secrets/logstash_password
      - ELASTICSEARCH_SSL_CERTIFICATEAUTHORITY=/usr/share/logstash/config/certs/ca.crt
      - "LS_JAVA_OPTS=-Xms512m -Xmx512m"
      - xpack.monitoring.enabled=true
      - xpack.monitoring.elasticsearch.hosts=https://elasticsearch:9200
      - xpack.monitoring.elasticsearch.ssl.certificate_authority=/usr/share/logstash/config/certs/ca.crt
      - LOG_LEVEL=info
    volumes:
      - ./logstash/pipeline:/usr/share/logstash/pipeline:ro
      - ./logstash/config/logstash.yml:/usr/share/logstash/config/logstash.yml:ro
      - ./certs:/usr/share/logstash/config/certs:ro
      - logstash_data:/usr/share/logstash/data
    secrets:
      - logstash_password
      - logstash_keystore_password
    ports:
      - "127.0.0.1:5044:5044"
      - "127.0.0.1:5000:5000/tcp"
      - "127.0.0.1:5000:5000/udp"
      - "127.0.0.1:9600:9600"
    networks:
      - elk_network
    healthcheck:
      test: >
        curl -s http://localhost:9600/_node/stats | grep -q '"status"'
      interval: 30s
      timeout: 10s
      retries: 5
      start_period: 90s
    restart: unless-stopped

  kibana:
    image: docker.elastic.co/kibana/kibana:8.12.0
    container_name: kibana
    depends_on:
      elasticsearch:
        condition: service_healthy
    environment:
      - ELASTICSEARCH_HOSTS=https://elasticsearch:9200
      - ELASTICSEARCH_USERNAME=kibana_system
      - ELASTICSEARCH_PASSWORD_FILE=/run/secrets/kibana_password
      - ELASTICSEARCH_SSL_CERTIFICATEAUTHORITIES=/usr/share/kibana/config/certs/ca.crt
      - SERVER_SSL_ENABLED=true
      - SERVER_SSL_CERTIFICATE=/usr/share/kibana/config/certs/kibana.crt
      - SERVER_SSL_KEY=/usr/share/kibana/config/certs/kibana.key
      - SERVER_HOST=0.0.0.0
      - SERVER_NAME=kibana
      - XPACK_SECURITY_ENCRYPTIONKEY_FILE=/run/secrets/kibana_encryption_key
      - XPACK_ENCRYPTEDSAVEDOBJECTS_ENCRYPTIONKEY_FILE=/run/secrets/kibana_saved_objects_key
      - XPACK_REPORTING_ENCRYPTIONKEY_FILE=/run/secrets/kibana_reporting_key
      - XPACK_SECURITY_SESSION_IDLETIMEOUT=30m
      - XPACK_SECURITY_SESSION_LIFESPAN=8h
      - CSP_STRICT=true
      - SERVER_SECURITYRESPONSEHEADERS_STRICTTRANSPORTSECURITY=max-age=31536000; includeSubDomains
      - SERVER_SECURITYRESPONSEHEADERS_X_CONTENT_TYPE_OPTIONS=nosniff
      - SERVER_SECURITYRESPONSEHEADERS_REFERRER_POLICY=strict-origin-when-cross-origin
      - SERVER_SECURITYRESPONSEHEADERS_PERMISSIONS_POLICY=camera=(), microphone=(), geolocation=()
      - LOGGING_ROOT_LEVEL=info
    volumes:
      - ./certs:/usr/share/kibana/config/certs:ro
      - kibana_data:/usr/share/kibana/data
    secrets:
      - kibana_password
      - kibana_encryption_key
      - kibana_saved_objects_key
      - kibana_reporting_key
    ports:
      - "127.0.0.1:5601:5601"
    networks:
      - elk_network
    healthcheck:
      test: >
        curl -s --cacert /usr/share/kibana/config/certs/ca.crt
        https://localhost:5601/api/status | grep -q '"level":"available"'
      interval: 30s
      timeout: 10s
      retries: 5
      start_period: 120s
    restart: unless-stopped
    read_only: true
    tmpfs:
      - /tmp:size=256m

  apm-server:
    image: docker.elastic.co/apm/apm-server:8.12.0
    container_name: apm-server
    depends_on:
      elasticsearch:
        condition: service_healthy
      kibana:
        condition: service_healthy
    cap_drop:
      - ALL
    cap_add:
      - NET_BIND_SERVICE
    command: >
      apm-server -e
        -E apm-server.host=0.0.0.0:8200
        -E apm-server.ssl.enabled=true
        -E apm-server.ssl.certificate=/usr/share/apm-server/config/certs/apm-server.crt
        -E apm-server.ssl.key=/usr/share/apm-server/config/certs/apm-server.key
        -E apm-server.auth.secret_token=${APM_SECRET_TOKEN_FILE}
        -E apm-server.auth.anonymous.enabled=false
        -E apm-server.rum.enabled=false
        -E output.elasticsearch.hosts=["https://elasticsearch:9200"]
        -E output.elasticsearch.username=apm_system
        -E output.elasticsearch.password_file=/run/secrets/apm_password
        -E output.elasticsearch.ssl.certificate_authorities=["/usr/share/apm-server/config/certs/ca.crt"]
        -E output.elasticsearch.ssl.verification_mode=full
        -E setup.kibana.host=https://kibana:5601
        -E setup.kibana.ssl.certificate_authorities=["/usr/share/apm-server/config/certs/ca.crt"]
        -E logging.level=info
        -E logging.to_stderr=true
    volumes:
      - ./certs:/usr/share/apm-server/config/certs:ro
      - apm_data:/usr/share/apm-server/data
    secrets:
      - apm_password
      - apm_secret_token
    ports:
      - "127.0.0.1:8200:8200"
    networks:
      - elk_network
    healthcheck:
      test: >
        curl -s --cacert /usr/share/apm-server/config/certs/ca.crt
        https://localhost:8200/ | grep -q '"publish_ready"'
      interval: 30s
      timeout: 10s
      retries: 5
      start_period: 60s
    restart: unless-stopped
    read_only: true
    tmpfs:
      - /tmp:size=128m

networks:
  elk_network:
    driver: bridge
    internal: false
    ipam:
      driver: default
      config:
        - subnet: 172.28.0.0/16
    driver_opts:
      com.docker.network.bridge.enable_icc: "true"
      com.docker.network.bridge.enable_ip_masquerade: "true"

volumes:
  elasticsearch_data:
    driver: local
    driver_opts:
      type: none
      o: bind
      device: ./data/elasticsearch
  logstash_data:
    driver: local
  kibana_data:
    driver: local
  apm_data:
    driver: local

secrets:
  elastic_password:
    file: ./secrets/elastic_password.txt
  logstash_password:
    file: ./secrets/logstash_password.txt
  logstash_keystore_password:
    file: ./secrets/logstash_keystore_password.txt
  kibana_password:
    file: ./secrets/kibana_password.txt
  kibana_encryption_key:
    file: ./secrets/kibana_encryption_key.txt
  kibana_saved_objects_key:
    file: ./secrets/kibana_saved_objects_key.txt
  kibana_reporting_key:
    file: ./secrets/kibana_reporting_key.txt
  apm_password:
    file: ./secrets/apm_password.txt
  apm_secret_token:
    file: ./secrets/apm_secret_token.txt
